channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Mediana for RTV SLO, 9–12 February 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 1 seats
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 0 seats
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 0 seats
  • Stranka generacij–Zeleni Slovenije (RE): 0 seats
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 2 seats
  • Mi, socialisti! (*): 0 seats
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 0 seats
  • Glas upokojencev (*): 0 seats
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Stranka ZAUPANJE (*): 0 seats
  • Resni.ca (NI): 0 seats
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 3 seats
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 1 seats
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 0 seats
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by Mediana for RTV SLO, 9–12 February 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Mediana for RTV SLO, 9–12 February 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 4.3–7.6%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 3.7–6.8%
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 1.5–3.7%
  • Stranka generacij–Zeleni Slovenije (RE): 0.8–2.6%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 1.7–4.1%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 13.7–19.0%
  • Mi, socialisti! (*): 0.6–2.3%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 2.5–5.2%
  • Glas upokojencev (*): 0.6–2.3%
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 2.8–5.6%
  • Stranka ZAUPANJE (*): 0.1–1.0%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 2.8–5.6%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 18.8–24.7%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 5.5–9.2%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 1.1–3.1%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 1.1–3.1%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.5–1.9%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ninamedia for Dnevnik, 9–11 February 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Ninamedia for Dnevnik, 9–11 February 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 5.8–10.2%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 3.4–6.9%
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 0.8–2.9%
  • Stranka generacij–Zeleni Slovenije (RE): 0.5–2.2%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 1.9–4.7%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 21.7–28.7%
  • Mi, socialisti! (*): 1.0–3.3%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 3.8–7.5%
  • Glas upokojencev (*): 0.5–2.2%
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 0.9–3.1%
  • Stranka ZAUPANJE (*): 0.7–2.6%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 2.5–5.5%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 25.1–32.3%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 5.4–9.6%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 1.8–4.5%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 1.0–3.3%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.5–2.2%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Info360.si, 7–11 February 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Info360.si, 7–11 February 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 13.5–15.8%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 5.4–7.0%
  • Stranka generacij–Zeleni Slovenije (RE): 4.5–6.0%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 2.5–3.6%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 14.3–16.7%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 3.2–4.5%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 3.0–4.3%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 25.1–28.0%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 5.3–6.8%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 1.6–2.5%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 1.8–2.8%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.9–1.6%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Valicon for TSmedia, 6–8 February 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Valicon for TSmedia, 6–8 February 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 6.2–9.0%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 3.5–5.8%
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 2.8–4.8%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 3.3–5.5%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 19.4–23.8%
  • Mi, socialisti! (*): 1.6–3.2%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 3.9–6.2%
  • Glas upokojencev (*): 0.8–2.1%
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 2.4–4.3%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 3.9–6.3%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 22.8–27.4%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 8.8–12.0%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 1.9–3.6%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 1.1–2.5%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.5–1.6%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Mediana for POP TV, 26–29 January 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 5.8–10.3%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 3.1–6.6%
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 1.7–4.4%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 2.4–5.5%

  • Mi, socialisti! (*): 0.6–2.6%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 3.5–7.2%
  • Glas upokojencev (*): 0.6–2.6%
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 3.5–7.2%
  • Stranka ZAUPANJE (*): 0.0–1.0%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 2.7–6.0%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 24.8–32.4%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 6.3–10.9%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 1.7–4.4%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 0.9–3.1%
  • Zeleni Slovenije (RE): 0.6–2.6%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.4–2.1%
